title: viola chelmea
intro: Viola chelmea, also known as yellow pansy or pansy violet, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). Traditionally, Viola chelmea has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Viola chelmea include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola chelmea can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
